title: My Home and My Room
scene: 家里有哪些房间；我房间里的东西和方位

patterns.template: There is a ___ in my room.
It is on / in / under the ___.

sentences.text: We live in a small house.
sentences.gloss: 我们住在一座小房子里。

sentences.text: It has a kitchen and a bathroom, and my bedroom is upstairs.
sentences.gloss: 房子里有厨房和卫生间，我的卧室在楼上。

sentences.text: My room has one door, one window and a big light.
sentences.gloss: 我的房间有一扇门、一扇窗和一盏大灯。

sentences.text: There is a bed by the wall, and my desk is under the window.
sentences.gloss: 墙边有一张床，我的书桌在窗户下面。

sentences.text: My books are on the desk, and my toys are in a box on the floor.
sentences.gloss: 我的书在书桌上，玩具在地板上的一个箱子里。

sentences.text: In the kitchen there is a table with four chairs.
sentences.gloss: 厨房里有一张桌子和四把椅子。

sentences.text: It is not a big house, but I love my home.
sentences.gloss: 这不是一座大房子，但我爱我的家。
